Part 3

Identifying Folders

Take a look at the diagram below. Use your mouse to point to the folders listed; look out for the green tick when you get it right! When you are ready, click Next Section.

Point to the Root Drive
Point to the folder Work Documents
Point to the folder Home Documents
Point to the folder Timetable
Point to the folder Money
